rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE JOHN SAPONE et al TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Use Settled Statement Instead Of Reporters Transcript
rulings.Rulings: Motion to Use Settled Statement is Granted. Trustee stipulated to the relief and no other party filed opposition. Any party who contests the tentative and request oral argument must notify the Court 415-551-3702 and other parties no later than 5:00 p.m. on 12/18/2013. If no argument is requested the Proposed Order will be filed 12/19/2013.
